    Λ • (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential.deriv d) A

ext ε
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, Tensorial.smulLinearMap_apply, deriv,
    LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk']
  calc _
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ * distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) •
        (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun μ _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ν _ => ?_)
      simp only [distDeriv, SpaceTime.distDeriv_apply, SMul.smul, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply,
        Lorentz.Vector.smul_eq_sum, SpaceTime.deriv_comp_lorentz_action, map_sum, map_smul,
        Lorentz.Vector.apply_sum, smul_eq_mul, Finset.sum_smul, mul_assoc]
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) •
        (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ.1 ν κ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun μ _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ν _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      rw [smul_tmul, tmul_smul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, smul_smul]
      congr 1
      simp only [smul_eq_mul]
      ring
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) •
        (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ.1 ν κ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      conv_lhs => enter [2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      conv_lhs => rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      conv_lhs => enter [2, κ, 2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      conv_lhs => enter [2, κ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) • (∑ μ, Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (∑ ν, Λ.1 ν κ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      conv_rhs =>
        enter [2, κ, 2, ρ]; rw [sum_tmul, Finset.smul_sum]
        enter [2, μ]; rw [tmul_sum, Finset.smul_sum]
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) • (Λ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis κ) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      congr 2
      · rw [Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis]
      · rw [Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis]
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) • Λ • ((Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
      Lorentz.Vector.basis κ) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      rw [Tensorial.smul_prod]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  rfl

end DistElectromagneticPotential

    LinearMap.smul_apply, SpaceTime.distDeriv_comp_lorentz_action,
    Lorentz.Vector.smul_eq_sum, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis,
    Tensorial.smul_prod, smul_sum, smul_smul, smul_tmul, tmul_smul, ← Finset.sum_smul,
    ← sum_tmul, ← tmul_sum, smul_eq_mul]
  simp_rw [Finset.sum_comm (s := Finset.univ)]
  congr 2
  funext κ ρ
  ring

end DistElectromagneticPotential

ext ε
  simp only [deriv, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk',
    SchwartzMap.smul_apply, SpaceTime.distDeriv_lorentz_action]
  simp_rw [Lorentz.Vector.smul_eq_sum, Lorentz.Vector.apply_sum, smul_eq_mul,
    Finset.sum_smul, Finset.smul_sum, ← smul_smul, ← tmul_smul, ← smul_tmul]
  simp_rw [Finset.sum_comm, ← Finset.smul_sum, ← Finset.sum_smul, ← tmul_sum, ← sum_tmul]
  simp_rw [← Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, ← Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Tensorial.smul_prod]
  rw [deriv]
  simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk',
    Tensorial.smulLinearMap_apply, Finset.sum_comm, Finset.smul_sum]
  rfl

ext ε
  simp only [deriv, smul_apply, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', Finset.sum_smul, smul_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  have h μ ν : distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν =
      ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ) * distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ := by
    simp [distDeriv, smul_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply,
      Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, ← Finset.sum_smul, ← Finset.sum_mul]
    congr; funext κ; rw [← A.map_smul, ← A.map_sum]; congr; funext x
    rw [SpaceTime.deriv_comp_lorentz_action Λ⁻¹ ε.differentiable]
    simp [smul_eq_mul, Finset.mul_sum, mul_comm]
  simp_rw [h, ← smul_eq_mul, smul_smul, tmul_smul, smul_tmul]
  conv_lhs => enter [2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  conv_lhs => rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  conv_lhs => enter [2, κ, 2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  conv_lhs => enter [2, κ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  simp_rw [← Finset.sum_smul, ← sum_tmul, ← tmul_sum,
    Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Tensorial.smul_prod]

ext ε
  simp only [deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, SpaceTime.distDeriv_lorentz_action,
    LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk']
  simp_rw [smul_eq_mul, mul_smul, Finset.sum_smul, Finset.sum_comm]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
  simp_rw [← smul_smul, ← smul_tmul, ← tmul_smul, ← Finset.sum_smul,
    Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Tensorial.smul_prod]

ext ε
  simp only [deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    LorentzGroup.smul_dist_apply]
  rw [spaceTime_distDeriv_action_eq_sum Λ A]
  simp_rw [smul_eq_mul, Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_smul, smul_smul, smul_tmul, tmul_smul,
    Finset.sum_comm, ← Tensorial.smul_prod, Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis]

ext ε
  simp only [Tensorial.smul_apply, deriv, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk']
  have h1 : ∀ μ κ, A (SpaceTime.deriv μ ε ∘ Λ) κ = ∑ ρ, Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ * A (SpaceTime.deriv ρ (ε ∘ Λ)) κ := by
    intro μ κ
    simp_rw [← SchwartzMap.coe_sum, ← SchwartzMap.smul_apply, ← SchwartzMap.coe_smul,
      SpaceTime.deriv_comp_lorentz_action (A := ε) (Λ := Λ⁻¹)]
    simp
  simp_rw [SpaceTime.distDeriv, SpaceTime.smul_apply, Lorentz.Vector.smul_eq_sum,
    Lorentz.Vector.apply_sum, smul_eq_mul, Finset.smul_sum, Finset.sum_smul, h1]
  simp_rw [← mul_assoc, smul_tmul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, Finset.sum_comm,
    ← Finset.smul_sum, ← sum_tmul, ← Finset.smul_sum, ← tmul_sum,
    Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Tensorial.smul_prod]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  rfl

end DistElectromagneticPotential

ext ε
  rw [deriv, Tensorial.smulLinearMap_apply]
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
  rw [SpaceTime.dist_action_apply, deriv]
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
  rw [SpaceTime.distDeriv_action_eq_sum Λ A ε]
  calc _
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ * distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ)) •
        (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun μ _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ν _ => ?_)
      rw [Finset.sum_smul]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      rw [Finset.sum_smul]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      congr 1
      simp only [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.reduceAdd, smul_eq_mul]
      ring
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ) •
        (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ.1 ν κ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun μ _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ν _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      rw [smul_tmul, tmul_smul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, smul_smul]
      congr 1
      simp only [Nat.reduceSucc, smul_eq_mul]
      ring
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ) •
        (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ.1 ν κ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      conv_lhs => enter [2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      conv_lhs => rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      conv_lhs => enter [2, κ, 2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
      conv_lhs => enter [2, κ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ) •
        (∑ μ, Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (∑ ν, Λ.1 ν κ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      conv_rhs =>
        enter [2, κ, 2, ρ]; rw [sum_tmul, Finset.smul_sum]
        enter [2, μ]; rw [tmul_sum, Finset.smul_sum];
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ) •
        (Λ • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ)) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis κ) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      congr 2
      · rw [Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis]
      · rw [Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis]
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ) • Λ •
        ((Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis κ) := by
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_)
      rw [Tensorial.smul_prod]
    _ = Λ • (∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (distDeriv ρ A (SpaceTime.lorentzSchwartz Λ ε) κ) •
        ((Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis κ)) := by
      rw [Finset.smul_sum, Finset.sum_comm]
      simp only [Finset.smul_sum, smul_assoc]
      rfl

ext ε
  simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', smul_apply, deriv]
  have h1 : ∀ μ ν, distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ) * distDeriv ρ A (ε ∘ Λ) κ := by
    intro μ ν; simp [distDeriv, smul_apply, Lorentz.Vector.smul_eq_sum,
      Lorentz.Vector.apply_sum, smul_eq_mul, Finset.sum_comm, ← A.map_smul, ← A.map_sum]
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => ?_)
    congr 1; ext x; simp [← Finset.mul_sum, ← SpaceTime.deriv_comp_lorentz_action]
    simp [Finset.sum_comm, mul_comm]
  simp_rw [h1, smul_tmul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  conv_lhs => enter [2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  conv_lhs => rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  conv_lhs => enter [2, κ, 2, μ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  conv_lhs => enter [2, κ]; rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  simp_rw [sum_tmul, tmul_sum, Finset.smul_sum, Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis,
    Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Tensorial.smul_prod]
  rfl

end DistElectromagneticPotential

ext ε
  rw [ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, deriv]
  simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk',
    SpaceTime.distDeriv_smul_lorentzGroup]
  calc
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ * SpaceTime.distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) •
        Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by
      simp only [Finset.sum_smul, smul_eq_mul, smul_smul]
    _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (SpaceTime.distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) • (Λ • Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
        (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis κ) := by
      simp_rw [smul_tmul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, Finset.sum_comm, ← Finset.sum_smul, ← tmul_sum,
        ← sum_tmul, Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis]
      simp only [smul_eq_mul, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm]
    _ = Λ • deriv A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) := by
      simp [deriv, Tensorial.smul_prod, ← Tensorial.smulLinearMap_apply]

end DistElectromagneticPotential

ext ε
  simp only [deriv, smul_apply, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk']
  rw [SpaceTime.distDeriv_comp_lorentz_action]
  simp_rw [smul_smul, mul_comm (Λ.1 _ _), ← smul_smul, smul_tmul, tmul_smul,
    ← Finset.sum_smul, ← sum_tmul, ← tmul_sum,
    Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis, Tensorial.smul_prod]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  simp_rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  rfl

end DistElectromagneticPotential

ext ε
  simp only [smul_apply, deriv, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk']
  calc _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ * SpaceTime.distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ)) •
          Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by
        simp_rw [SpaceTime.distDeriv_comp_lorentz_action, Finset.sum_smul, smul_eq_mul, smul_smul]
      _ = ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (SpaceTime.distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) • (Λ • Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ]
          (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis κ) := by
        simp_rw [smul_tmul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, Finset.sum_comm, sum_tmul, tmul_sum,
          Finset.smul_sum, Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis, Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis]
        refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun κ _ => Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun ρ _ => ?_))
        congr 1; ring
      _ = Λ • deriv A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) := by
        simp [deriv, Tensorial.smul_prod, Tensorial.smulLinearMap_apply, Finset.sum_comm]

end DistElectromagneticPotential
end Electromagnetism
